completed_tasks.name: Refactor WABA Template Handler Credentials Source

decisions.decision: Decoupled WABA Template Handler from credentials repo and pointed it to connections repo.
decisions.rationale: Allows template sync to run on multi-instance connection credentials directly.

decisions.decision: Redirected general workspaces index routes to the active workspace settings page.
decisions.rationale: Removes the redundant list of all workspaces and routes the user directly to the active workspace.

next_action: Wait for user's next instructions or define the next phase of the roadmap.
context_notes: We finished migrating the credentials logic away from the deprecated credentials table. The server is restarted and running perfectly.
